input.message: {"id":8589935233,"start_time":"2026-04-03T10:04:00.000000Z","update_time":"2026-04-03T10:05:00.000000Z","end_time":"2026-04-03T10:10:50.000000Z","title":"RDP Brute Force","description":"[VMware 37A983](https://ignitionfralab.cloud.extrahop.com#/metrics/devices/0ef46492f5c948f4ac6273a7c5274dba.00505637a9830000/overview) received an unusually high number of short Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) sessions, which could be caused by planned maintenance or could indicate a brute force attack.","risk_score":60,"type":"rdp_brute_force","recommended":true,"recommended_factors":["critical_asset","top_offender"],"categories":["sec.exploit","sec","sec.attack"],"properties":{},"participants":[{"role":"offender","scanner_service":null,"endpoint":"client","external":true,"object_id":8589934608,"object_type":"ipaddr","object_value":"119.192.80.227","username":null,"id":2098},{"role":"victim","scanner_service":null,"endpoint":"server","external":false,"object_id":8589934597,"object_type":"device","username":null,"id":1124}],"ticket_id":null,"assignee":null,"status":null,"resolution":null,"mitre_tactics":[{"id":"TA0006","name":"Credential Access","url":"https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/TA0006"}],"mitre_techniques":[{"id":"T1110","name":"Brute Force","url":"https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1110","legacy_ids":["T1110"]}],"appliance_id":2,"is_user_created":false,"mod_time":"2026-04-03T10:12:38.109000Z","create_time":"2026-04-03T10:04:59.548300Z","url":"https://ignitionfralab.cloud.extrahop.com/extrahop/?hashfragment=/detections/detail/8589935233"}
